translated: And the ark rested in the seventh month, on the seventeenth day of the month, on the mountains of Ararat. And the waters decreased continually until the tenth month: in the tenth month, on the first day of the month, were the tops of the mountains seen.

ref: God said, “I command lights to appear in the sky and to separate day from night and to show the time for seasons, special days, and years.
text: Amu na Katɔti údie lɛdi ɔnini, “Bukeye lidu libo kayaa na bule usien ku kadi nwaa ntɛ. Na ɔmɛni ɔbla likposela ute uwi ku emeyi ku akwa.
translated: And Katɔti said to them, “Let us go and see what the Lord has done. And the people went to see the work of the Lord.

ref: Jacob put servants in charge of each herd and told them, “Go ahead of me and keep a space between each herd.”
text: Bebuo bamɛni ƒui na Yakob úti ɔ́kya nwuna kabla bablane lɛkɔkɔ ka bataanu-ma lɛlɔ bana esu esu ammɔ na ɔ́su-ma ɔnini, “Bɛgyu bataatɔ-mi na bɛya na kuƒi kɔkya bebuo bammɔ ntɛ na bana esu ammɔ kenye.”
translated: And it happened that as Jacob was coming from the well, the shepherds were gathering their flocks to water them, and he said to them, “Why are you gathering the flocks to water them now?”

ref: While Jacob was still talking with the men, his cousin Rachel came up with her father's sheep.
text: Uwi ɔni na ɔmu unye ɔɔtɛmiku-ma ni, Rahel ɔ́da úbalɛ ku ɔti baƒonu, ɔsika baƒonu ɔdane na ɔdi.
translated: And when Rachel saw that she bore Jacob no children, Rachel envied her sister, and said to Jacob, Give me children, or else I die.

ref: Before there were kings in Israel, the following kings ruled Edom one after another: Bela son of Beor from Dinhabah; Jobab son of Zerah from Bozrah; Husham from the land of Teman; Hadad son of Bedad from Avith ; Samlah from Masrekah; Shaul from the city of Rehoboth on the Euphrates River; Baalhanan son of Achbor; Hadar from the city of Pau .
text: Na nwuna kama ni, Hadar nébelie-nwu kenye. Uwi ɔni na Baal-Hanan úkpi ni, Hadad nélie-nwu kenye aani ɔga. Na ɔma ɔni na úlie baalɔ Pau. Na ulekudi ndi Matred ubidi ulekubi Mehetabel na ɔdi Me-Sahab uwɔ.
